name: emails
description: When the user wants to create or optimize an email sequence, drip campaign, automated email flow, or lifecycle email program. Also use when the user mentions "email sequence," "drip campaign," "nurture sequence," "onboarding emails," "welcome sequence," "re-engagement emails," "email automation," "lifecycle emails," "trigger-based emails," "email funnel," "email workflow," "what emails should I send," "welcome series," or "email cadence." Use this for any multi-email automated flow. For cold out
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 专帮你搭建和优化自动化邮件流的工具。无论是做新用户欢迎、流失唤醒还是滴灌营销，只要涉及多封邮件的自动触发和节奏规划，它都能轻松搞定。
